creator: @sethgolie
transcript: Bro, let's hit Buffalo Wild Wings for the game tonight. I'm down. I will get the five-piece chicken tenders naked, and then I will get a side salad, no croutons, light vinaigrette, and a Diet Coke. Oh, damn. I didn't even know you could order like that. You must not be following Seth G. yet. Shit. I better follow Seth G. right now.
caption: You're not FAT because you eat out, you're fat because what you order. Going to Buffalo Wild Wings for the game? Order this to stay on track. Naked Tenders (5 count) + Side Salad (no croutons, light vinaigrette) + Diet Coke (380 calories 65 G protein). Save this for later. Follow for fast food swaps. #macrofriendly #fitover40
ocr_summary: Original: 10 COUNT - 2040 CALORIES, 60G PROTEIN. Swap: 380 CALORIES, 65G PROTEIN.

swaps.swap_meal: Naked Tenders (5 count) + Side Salad (no croutons, light vinaigrette) + Diet Coke

parsed.notes: Single swap. Compares typical BWW 10-count tenders order (2040 cal) vs a lighter 5-count naked tenders + salad combo (380 cal). Massive calorie reduction while maintaining protein.
